title: Status
body:
![Status](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/086425cccc4015fafcf807c55e9af7ab2a5d9118.png)
This plugin adds four statuses:
none, afk, busy, and streaming.
They can be toggled using the /status and /st commands.
If a player stands idle for two minutes (the time, icons, and much more can be configured in the config), their status automatically changes to afk. You can change this using the /status autoAFK true/false command.
Russian and English translations are available.
